mapper.sql: id, title, intro, tech_name, cover_url, link_url, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into `knowledge_base` (title, intro, tech_name, cover_url, link_url, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{title}, #{intro}, #{techName}, #{coverUrl}, #{linkUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update `knowledge_base` set title = #{title}, intro = #{intro}, tech_name = #{techName}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, link_url = #{linkUrl}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
update `knowledge_base` set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select from `knowledge_base` where status = 1 order by sort_order asc, id asc
select from `knowledge_base` order by sort_order asc, id asc
